InspirationRitual.PsychicRitualDef_Inspi.label: Inspiphagy
InspirationRitual.PsychicRitualDef_Inspi.description: Psychically shares experiences from the victim's mind to provoke an inspiration in the invoker, targeting the victim's highest skill. The target will fall into a coma for several days with a chance for the target to die.
InspirationRitual.PsychicRitualDef_Inspi.outcomeDescription: With the current ritual quality, there is a {0}% chance of the target dying.
